name: lead-ingestion-webhook
description: Serverless lead ingestion webhook handler compatible with Vercel and AWS Lambda

scripts.start: node -e "const http=require('http'); const handler=require('./serverless').handler; const server=http.createServer((req,res)=>{ if(req.method==='POST'){ let b=''; req.on('data',c=>b+=c); req.on('end',()=>{ handler({httpMethod:'POST',body:b,headers:req.headers},{callbackWaitsForEmptyEventLoop:()=>{}}).then(r=>{res.writeHead(r.statusCode,{'Content-Type':'application/json'});res.end(r.body)})})}}); server.listen(3000,()=>console.log('Webhook listening on :3000'))"
scripts.test: node -e "const assert=require('assert'); const h=require('./serverless').handler; (async()=>{let r=await h({httpMethod:'GET'});assert(r.statusCode===405);r=await h({httpMethod:'POST',body:'bad'});assert(r.statusCode===400);r=await h({httpMethod:'POST',body:JSON.stringify({name:'',email:'bad'})});assert(r.statusCode===422);r=await h({httpMethod:'POST',body:JSON.stringify({name:'Test User',email:'test@example.com'})});assert(r.statusCode===200);console.log('All tests passed')})()"
